_info: Generic defaults for any club/organisation meeting. Edit and commit changes for your group.
happy_sad: Member C shared that they recently completed a volunteer training program over the weekend.
Member A expressed gratitude for the team’s support during a busy month.

agenda.title: Review of Previous Minutes
agenda.body: The minutes from the last meeting were reviewed and approved by the members.

agenda.title: Upcoming Events Planning
agenda.body: Discussed planning for the upcoming community outreach event scheduled for next month.

recurring_items: The floor was opened for Any Other Business (AOB), during which members shared updates and announcements.
The Chair thanked all members for their continued enthusiasm and active participation.
